A one-paragraph idea typed into the chat box on a Mac with a configured ChatGPT Pro subscription produces, end-to-end on the VPS: 3-4 candidate plans (one ChatGPT Pro via Oracle, others via CLIs), a comparative matrix, a synthesis, a fresh-eyes critique, and at least 4 refinement rounds — all persisted under .hoopoe/plans/<plan-id>/ and survivable across desktop sleep (except the active ChatGPT Pro round, per the documented limitation). The user can lock the result.

ACCEPTANCE TEST (§18.1 Phase 5)
================================
One-paragraph idea produces candidates, comparison, synthesis, refinement, lock, cost ledger, and persisted artifacts after desktop restart.

title: Phase 8: Composition picker (manual ratios + 'let Hoopoe choose' auto-select per agent-flywheel defaults)
description:
WHAT
====
Pre-launch composition picker per §7.3 'Agent composition'. Two modes: manual ratios with per-harness count fields (Claude Code / Codex CLI / Gemini CLI), per-harness CAAM-account selection, account-pressure warning when count > available accounts, total cap (12 default). 'Let Hoopoe choose' auto-select uses agent-flywheel guide's bead-count-keyed defaults.

AUTO-SELECT DEFAULTS (§7.3)
=============================
| Open ready beads | Claude Code | Codex CLI | Gemini CLI |
| ---------------- | ----------- | --------- | ---------- |
| 400+             | 4           | 4         | 2          |
| 100-399          | 3           | 3         | 2          |
| <100             | 1           | 1         | 1          |

Auto-select also accounts for available accounts; falls back proportionally if user has fewer subscriptions configured. User can review auto-selected composition + tweak before launching.

TOTAL CAP
==========
12 by default — agent-flywheel guide identifies as practical upper bound. Above 12, efficiency declines faster than throughput grows. Configurable in project settings.

ACCOUNT-PRESSURE WARNING
=========================
If user requests N agents of harness X but only has M accounts (M < N), warn: 'You have 1 Claude Max account but requested 4 Claude Code agents — they will share the account and may rate-limit.'

GREYED-OUT HARNESSES
======================
For harnesses without configured subscription, picker greys them out + shows pointer to subscription pages (§13).

CROSS-REFERENCES
================
- §7.3 — composition spec.
- agent-flywheel guide bead-count defaults.
- §13 — subscription requirement.
- CAAM adapter (this phase) — account counts.

DEFINITION OF DONE
==================
- Picker UI matches design/mockups/v1.
- Manual ratio mode + 'Let Hoopoe choose' mode.
- Account-pressure warning shown at request > available.
- Total cap enforced.
- Greyed harnesses for missing subscriptions.
- Phase 8 acceptance: launch a 2/1/1 swarm via auto-select; agents register.
